prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) is a UK Government initiative primarily focused on England. It does not include specific provisions or applicability for Scotland, which has separate regulations and funding mechanisms for social housing and energy efficiency measures.
